title: Andrew Miles
compiled_truth: Andrew Miles is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-16 to 2001-11-30), Andrew Miles sent 28 and received 118 emails, totalling 146 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (18), [Mark Breese](people/mark-breese) (7), [V Weldon](people/v-weldon) (6), [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (2), [Lisa Druzbik](people/lisa-druzbik) (2).
